items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario regarding permission scope enforcement, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes, yet none specifically address the enforcement of permission scopes. This indicates a lack of necessary evidence to determine if the requirement is satisfied.
